DISCOVERY 610, TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED AS MODIFIED. DEFENDANTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO' MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO DEFENDANTS' DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION [OF] DOCUMENTS, SET TWO; AND MOTION FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED IN PART TO REQUIRE PLAINTIFF TO RESPOND TO REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION NOS. 22 AND 23 ONLY. PRODUCTION WILL BE LIMITED TO DOCUMENTS REFERENCING THE INCIDENT THAT IS THE BASIS FOR PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM, AND THE INJURIES THAT PLAINTIFF ALLEGES TO HAVE INCURRED. NO. 24 IS DENIED. PARTIES SHALL MEET AND CONFER CONCERNING THE DATES TO BE COVERED BY THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. NOT REPORTED.

(Amended)Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Defts' Demand For Production Of Documents, Set Two, And Motion For Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-05-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Joshua S. White, Deputy City Attorney, for defendant and moving party: City and County of San Francisco
Emily Fowler, Esq., for plaintiff and opposing party: Carolyn Cook

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted as modified. Defendants City and County of San Francisco' motion to compel further responses to defendants' demand for production [of] documents, set two; and motion for sanctions is granted in part to require plaintiff to respond to requests for production nos. 22 and 23 only. Production will be limited to documents referencing the incident that is the basis for plaintiff's claim, and the injuries that plaintiff alleges to have incurred.
No. 24 is denied.
Parties shall meet and confer concerning the dates to be covered by this order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
